ksa_text: Skill in managing data and AI investment portfolios across multiple concurrent initiatives, including prioritization frameworks, resource allocation, portfolio performance tracking, and initiative rebalancing.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and resource allocations (e.g., data analytics, data infrastructure).

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of performance tuning tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Leadership & Strategy is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of Data Governance. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Leadership & Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.515). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Data Governance versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: McKinsey, Gartner, and Harvard Business Review consistently identify leadership and strategy skills as core differentiators for C-suite and VP data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Leadership & Strategy appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Data Governance.

decision_rationale: Leadership & Strategy skill KSA is within scope for the Director of Data Governance at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
